tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests are AST-based text inspection (checking for presence/absence of specific strings, variable names, JSX attributes in source files) rather than executing the code. test_settings_toggle_handles_session_and_directory is literally 'toggleAutoAcceptDirectory in src' — a plain text search. The typecheck test does execute compilation, but the core behavioral tests (f2p) are all static analysis of source text, not runtime behavior verification.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub implementation would not pass these tests. test_permissions_button_removed_from_composer requires actual removal of specific code from prompt-input.tsx. test_auto_accept_toggle_in_settings requires adding a Switch with checked/onChange and a specific data-action. test_settings_uses_permission_context requires importing and calling usePermission. test_prompt_input_not_stubbed requires >1000 lines. These collectively prevent trivial stubs.
